response.justification: Bogdan exhibits exceptional full-stack expertise with 12+ years of progressive experience, including deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React fluency, direct AI-agent infrastructure work, and a strong customer-focused mindset. His portfolio demonstrates consistent delivery of scalable solutions across diverse domains, with measurable impact in high-throughput systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (TypeScript/Node.js/React) with 12+ years in production
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong problem-solving and architecture skills with measurable impact on high-performance systems
concerns: Primary stack leans heavily toward TypeScript/JavaScript with limited Kotlin/Java exposure
Recent employment gaps and short tenures at some roles
Limited public examples of Vitest/Playwright testing framework usage
